code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant orch_api as Orchestration
    participant auth_frontend as Authentication Frontend
    participant auth_external_api as Authentication External API
    participant auth_internal_api as Authentication Internal API
    participant account_interventions as Account Interventions API
    participant notification_queue as NotificationHandler.java Lambda   
    participant notify as Notify   
    orch_api ->> auth_frontend : OAuth 2.0 Authorization request 302 redirect to /authorize
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend : Decrypt and validate request and create session    
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /start (IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Start helps calculate current state
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend : StartResponse.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend : State machine works out where to send user based on start response
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /user-exists (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Checks if account with email already exists
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: CheckUserExistsResponse.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend: Validates that the user already has an account
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /account-interventions (IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)
    auth_internal_api ->> account_interventions : Request to account interventions api (IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)
    account_interventions ->> auth_internal_api : Response from Account Interventions containing blocked=true
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Generates audit event for "blocked" Account Intervention
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: AccountInterventions.java object returned containing blocked intervention
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend: Prevents user from performing password reset due to blocked intervention
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /login (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Validates if password is correct
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: LoginResponse.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /account-recovery (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Calculates whether account recovery is permitted
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: AccountRecovery.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /mfa (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Generates and stores OTP
    auth_internal_api -->> notification_queue : Sends NotifyRequest.java object via SQS
    notification_queue -->> notify : Request to send SMS containing OTP and phone number
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend : 204 response 
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend: Prevents user from performing MFA reset due to blocked intervention
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /verify-code (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Validates whether SMS MFA code is valid
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: 204 response
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend : Displays Blocked intervention screen

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个完整的OAuth 2.0授权流程图，从Orchestration API开始，经过前端认证，一直到最终的拦截或成功场景。重点是展示当用户账户被标记为blocked时的完整干预链路。
明白了。我先确认一下结构：起点是Orchestration，然后302重定向到Authentication Frontend的/authorize端点，接着前端解密请求并创建session。这个session创建步骤需要单独画出来吗？
对，session创建要画成自调用，因为那是前端内部的处理。然后前端会调用Authentication Internal API的/start端点，这里要标注上IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode，这是我们的内部追踪标记。
好的，我已经添加了前端到Internal API的/start调用，以及Internal API的自调用计算当前状态，然后返回StartResponse.java对象。接下来是状态机决定用户去向的逻辑？
对，状态机也是自调用。然后前端要检查用户是否存在，调用/user-exists，标记为IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker。Internal API这里要检查email是否已注册，返回CheckUserExistsResponse.java。
已添加。我注意到这里有个验证步骤——前端验证用户已有账户，这也是自调用。接下来进入关键部分：账户干预检查？
没错，这是核心流程。前端调用/account-interventions，同样标记IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode，然后Internal API再调用Account Interventions API，也是同样的标记。这里要返回blocked=true的响应。
画好了。我添加了Internal API生成blocked干预的审计事件，这也是自调用，然后返回AccountInterventions.java对象给前端。前端接下来会阻止密码重置？
对，阻止密码重置是自调用。但用户还是可以尝试登录，所以下一步是/login调用，标记为IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic。Internal API验证密码正确性，返回LoginResponse.java。
登录成功后，流程走向账户恢复检查？我看到有/account-recovery端点，标记也是MQTT Broker。
是的，Internal API计算是否允许账户恢复，返回AccountRecovery.java。然后进入MFA流程，调用/mfa，同样MQTT Broker标记，生成并存储OTP。
MFA部分我画好了自调用生成OTP。然后Internal API通过SQS发送NotifyRequest.java对象给NotificationHandler.java Lambda，Lambda再调用Notify服务发送SMS。这里用虚线表示异步消息对吗？
对，SQS和Notify都用虚线箭头。Internal API返回204给前端，然后前端要阻止MFA重置——因为账户还是被blocked状态。
已添加阻止MFA重置的自调用。接下来是验证码验证，/verify-code端点，MQTT Broker标记，验证SMS MFA code有效后返回204。
最后一步，前端显示Blocked intervention screen。整个流程虽然用户完成了登录和MFA验证，但因为干预状态是blocked，最终仍然被拦截。
完整流程已确认：从Orchestration开始，经过多层认证检查，账户干预API返回blocked贯穿始终，最终用户看到拦截页面。所有IoT标记和Java对象返回都按你的要求标注了。
